purpose: Thin adapter that mounts the shared ClaudeView component inside the Chat tab's 'chat-instance' surface. Pulls the active chat tab from AppContext (chatTabs + chatActiveTabId), derives a pseudo dashboard id of the form 'chat-agent-<4hex>' from the tab's agentHex, and forwards it to ClaudeView as `chatAgentId` so streaming, tool-call rendering, permissions, and conversation history all work without a real code dashboard being selected. Forwards `tab` and `surface` props (defaulted to 'chat') so ClaudeView can branch behavior between code-floating-panel and chat-mode rendering.
gotchas: chatAgentId here ('chat-agent-<hex>') is a PSEUDO-ID — it is NOT a real dashboard id and must never be passed to dashboard CRUD/IPC handlers that expect a true dashboard slug. ClaudeView and dashboardProjects.js are the only places that knowingly accept it.
If activeTab.agentHex is missing the component falls back to activeTab.id, which is also non-canonical. Code paths receiving chatAgentId must accept either form (4-hex agent or raw tab id).

Defaulting `tab='chat'` and `surface='chat'` is load-bearing — ClaudeView uses these to skip the 'Select a dashboard' empty state and to render in chat-mode layout. Removing the defaults will make the chat panel render as if it's the code-mode floating panel.
useMemo deps are [chatTabs, chatActiveTabId]; mutating a tab in place without changing chatTabs reference will not refresh activeTab.
patterns: Reuse-by-prop: same ClaudeView component renders in two surfaces (code-floating-panel and chat-instance) — distinguished only by `tab`/`surface` props, not by a separate component.

Pseudo-id namespace: chat tabs masquerade as dashboards via the 'chat-agent-' prefix, letting per-dashboard utilities (project storage, processing-stash, unread counts) work uniformly across both surfaces.
conventions: Wrapper div uses class 'chat-instance-claude-wrap' so chat-mode CSS can override ClaudeView's default layout without touching the shared component.

related: src/ui/components/chat/ChatSidebar.jsx (creates the tabs whose agentHex becomes chatAgentId)
electron/services/ConversationService.js (persists messages keyed off the 'chat-agent-<hex>' id)
